entry.data:
MOSTLY CLEAR THIS EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 50S
SOUTHEAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY SUNNY WITH A SLIGHT CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
SOUTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 20 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS AFTER MIDNIGHT
MORE HUMID WITH LOWS IN THE UPPER 60S
SOUTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 30 PERCENT

PARTLY SUNNY IN THE MORNING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 80S
SOUTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE MID 60S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 80S
LOWS IN THE UPPER 60S

PARTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS
HIGHS AROUND 90
LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

SHOWERS LIKELY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 80S
LOWS IN THE MID 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

PARTLY SUNNY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

PARTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS AROUND 80
CHANCE OF RAIN 30 PERCENT
